title: Plutarch, Moralia: On Tranquillity of Mind
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Tranquillity of Mind.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Tranquillity of Mind.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On Tranquillity of Mind': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
